prose: Fukui reactivity analysis of aniline performed at DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard', PySCF RKS, density-fitted), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry from user-supplied aniline.xyz (single point, not re-optimized). Fukui indices computed via finite-difference Mulliken population analysis using N, N+1 (cation: charge +1, mult 2), and N-1 (anion: charge -1, mult 2) states. Most electrophilic site: C3 (atom 3, 1-based), f+ = 2.2975867. Most nucleophilic site: N1 (atom 1, 1-based), f- = 0.20452359. All integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true); sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f-) = 1.0000. No warnings reported.
